name: manage-tasks
title: Manage Tasks
description: This allows you to create new tasks, view current tasks and so on for the local Sqllite Tasks database in the home directory.
author: schalk_conradie

commands.name: create-new-task
commands.title: Create New Task
commands.description: This will go and create a new task in the database for you to later see.
commands.subtitle: Create a new task in the database

commands.name: view-all-tasks
commands.title: View Unfinished Tasks
commands.description: View unfinished tasks in the local activity database
commands.subtitle: View unfinished tasks

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
